'''âsh-b-w''' ('''kashabaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heatsink|heatsink]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heatsink|heatsink]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-b-w
|-
! Lemma
| kashabaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishabaw|thishabaw]] || [[word:jishabaw|jishabaw]] || [[word:shishabaw|shishabaw]] || [[word:kishabaw|kishabaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushabaw|thuthushabaw]] || [[word:jujushabaw|jujushabaw]] || [[word:shushushabaw|shushushabaw]] || [[word:kukushabaw|kukushabaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushabaw|thushabaw]] || [[word:jushabaw|jushabaw]] || [[word:shushabaw|shushabaw]] || [[word:kushabaw|kushabaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushabaw|thushabaw]] || [[word:jushabaw|jushabaw]] || [[word:shushabaw|shushabaw]] || [[word:kushabaw|kushabaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshabaw|theshabaw]] || [[word:jeshabaw|jeshabaw]] || [[word:sheshabaw|sheshabaw]] || [[word:keshabaw|keshabaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshabaw|thothoshabaw]] || [[word:jojoshabaw|jojoshabaw]] || [[word:shoshoshabaw|shoshoshabaw]] || [[word:kokoshabaw|kokoshabaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshabaw|thoshabaw]] || [[word:joshabaw|joshabaw]] || [[word:shoshabaw|shoshabaw]] || [[word:koshabaw|koshabaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshabaw|thoshabaw]] || [[word:joshabaw|joshabaw]] || [[word:shoshabaw|shoshabaw]] || [[word:koshabaw|koshabaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshabaw|thĂŠshabaw]] || [[word:jĂŠshabaw|jĂŠshabaw]] || [[word:shĂŠshabaw|shĂŠshabaw]] || [[word:kĂŠshabaw|kĂŠshabaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashabaw|thathashabaw]] || [[word:jajashabaw|jajashabaw]] || [[word:shashashabaw|shashashabaw]] || [[word:kakashabaw|kakashabaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashabaw|thashabaw]] || [[word:jashabaw|jashabaw]] || [[word:shashabaw|shashabaw]] || [[word:kashabaw|kashabaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashabaw|thashabaw]] || [[word:jashabaw|jashabaw]] || [[word:shashabaw|shashabaw]] || [[word:kashabaw|kashabaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashabaw|shashabaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashabaw|goshashabaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashabaw|gokishashabaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashabawnĂŒ|shashabawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashabawnknĂŒ|goshashabawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabawnĂŒ|gokishashabawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashabawshĂ«|shashabawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashabawnkshĂ«|goshashabawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashabawshĂ«|gokishashabawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabawro|shashabawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabawnkro|goshashabawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabawro|gokishashabawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabawmu|shashabawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabawnkmu|goshashabawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabawmu|gokishashabawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashabawsher|shashabawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashabawnksher|goshashabawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashabawsher|gokishashabawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashabawng|shashabawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashabawnkng|goshashabawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashabawng|gokishashabawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashabawya|shashabawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashabawnkya|goshashabawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashabawya|gokishashabawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashabawyam|shashabawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashabawnkyam|goshashabawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashabawyam|gokishashabawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashabawnĂŒshĂ«|shashabawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashabawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashabawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashabawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashabawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabawnĂŒro|shashabawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabawnknĂŒro|goshashabawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabawnĂŒro|gokishashabawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabawnĂŒmu|shashabawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabawnknĂŒmu|goshashabawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabawnĂŒmu|gokishashabawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashabawshĂ«nĂŒ|shashabawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashabawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashabawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashabawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabawshĂ«ro|shashabawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabawnkshĂ«ro|goshashabawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabawshĂ«ro|gokishashabawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabawshĂ«mu|shashabawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabawnkshĂ«mu|goshashabawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabawshĂ«mu|gokishashabawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashabawronĂŒ|shashabawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashabawnkronĂŒ|goshashabawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabawronĂŒ|gokishashabawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashabawroshĂ«|shashabawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashabawnkroshĂ«|goshashabawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashabawroshĂ«|gokishashabawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabawromu|shashabawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabawnkromu|goshashabawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabawromu|gokishashabawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashabawmunĂŒ|shashabawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashabawnkmunĂŒ|goshashabawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabawmunĂŒ|gokishashabawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashabawmushĂ«|shashabawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashabawnkmushĂ«|goshashabawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashabawmushĂ«|gokishashabawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabawmuro|shashabawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabawnkmuro|goshashabawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabawmuro|gokishashabawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
